title: Implement AI extraction pipeline (parties, timeline, facts, obligations, risks)
description: Build the OpenAI-powered structured extraction pipeline. After a document is parsed, trigger extraction using GPT-4o with function calling. Validate output with Zod. Persist to DocumentExtraction table. Display extracted intelligence on the document detail page.

acceptance_criteria.text: Extraction triggered automatically after successful document parsing
GPT-4o extracts: parties (name, role), timeline events (date, description), key facts, obligations, risk flags
Extraction output validated with Zod schema before persisting
Document detail page shows extraction results in structured panels
Extraction failures are logged and document status set to 'failed' with user-visible message

steps: Create lib/ai/extraction.ts with structured extraction prompt and Zod output schema
Use OpenAI function calling / structured outputs to guarantee JSON shape
Create lib/ai/pipeline.ts to orchestrate: parse → extract → embed
Build document detail page with extraction panels (Parties, Timeline, Facts, Obligations, Risks)
Add error handling with status updates on failure
risks: GPT-4o rate limits on large documents — implement chunked extraction for docs >8k tokens
Extraction cost — log token usage per document for future billing baseline
